languages.original_text: "Subsequent to his servitorisation, he was assigned to the lower decks and resumed his service to the dynasty. In their ignorance, many of the laypeople see his return as a miracle of the God-Emperor, offering him gifts and draping primitive wards over his carapace. Naturally, as an instrument of the Omnissiah, he is only capable of executing his programmed protocols of diligence, remaining oblivious to the occurrence of these... rituals. That is an incontrovertible fact."

languages.text: "Пройдя сервиторизацию, он был распределен на нижние палубы, где возобновил службу династии. Многие миряне в своей наивности воспринимают его "возвращение" как чудо Бога-Императора, подносят ему дары и вешают примитивные обереги на панцирь. Естественно, став инструментом Омниссии, он лишь умеет следовать заложенным в него протоколам старания и даже не подозревает о существовании этих... обрядов. Это неопровержимый факт".

"Subsequent to his servitorisation, he was assigned to the lower decks and resumed his service to the dynasty. In their ignorance, many of the laypeople see his return as a miracle of the God-Emperor, offering him gifts and draping primitive talismans over his carapace. Naturally, as an instrument of the Omnissiah, he is only capable of executing his programmed protocols of diligence, remaining oblivious to the occurrence of these... rituals. That is an incontrovertible fact."

Многие миряне в своей наивности воспринимают его "возвращение" как чудо Бога-Императора, подносят ему дары и вешают примитивные обереги на панцирь. traits.locale_text: "Subsequent to his servitorisation he was designated to the lower decks, resuming his service to the dynasty. In their ignorance, many of the laypeople see his return as a miracle of the God-Emperor, offering him gifts and draping primitive wards over his carapace. Naturally, as an instrument of the Omnissiah, he is only capable of executing his programmed protocols of diligence, remaining oblivious to the existence of these... rituals. That is an incontrovertible fact."

"Subsequent to his servitorisation, he was assigned to the lower decks and resumed his service to the dynasty. In their ignorance, many of the laypeople see his return as a miracle of the God-Emperor, offering him gifts and draping primitive talismans over his carapace. Naturally, as an instrument of the Omnissiah, he is only capable of executing his programmed protocols of diligence, remaining oblivious to the occurrence of these... rituals. That is an incontrovertible fact."

"He has returned to the lower decks and resumed his duties. Some fear his strange appearance, but many see his return as a miracle of the God-Emperor. However, his unsupervised adaptation has not been smooth — fits of rage, exhaustion, and wailing are not uncommon, not to mention pain syndrome. I... am concerned for him, but I am reluctant to offer help in the fear that I may retraumatise his mind and spirit."

That is an incontrovertible fact."

In their ignorance, many of the laypeople see his return as a miracle of the God-Emperor, offering him gifts and draping primitive talismans over his carapace. Naturally, as an instrument of the Omnissiah, he is only capable of executing his programmed protocols of diligence, remaining oblivious to the occurrence of these... rituals. That is an incontrovertible fact."

languages.text: 「彼は下甲板に戻り、任務を再開した。彼の奇妙な姿に恐怖する者もいるが、多くは彼の帰還を皇帝神の奇跡と見る。しかし、彼の無監督の適応は順調ではなかった。怒りや疲労、悲鳴は珍しくない。痛み症候群も。私は彼を心配しているが、彼の精神を再び傷つけないよう、助けを差し伸べるのがためらわれる」
languages.original_text: "He has returned to the lower decks and resumed his duties. Some fear his strange appearance, but many see his return as a miracle of the God-Emperor. However, his unsupervised adaptation has not been smooth — fits of rage, exhaustion, and wailing are not uncommon, not to mention pain syndrome. I... am concerned for him, but I am reluctant to offer help in the fear that I may retraumatise his mind and spirit."

traits.locale_text: 「彼は下甲板に戻り、任務を再開した。彼の奇妙な姿に恐怖する者もいるが、多くは彼の帰還を皇帝神の奇跡と見る。しかし、彼の無監督の適応は順調ではなかった。怒りや疲労、悲鳴は珍しくない。痛み症候群も。私は彼を心配しているが、彼の精神を再び傷つけないよう、助けを差し伸べるのがためらわれる。」

languages.text: “被改造为机仆之后，他被分配到了下层甲板，重新开始为王朝服役。许多教外人士出于无知，竟将他的归来视作神皇降下的奇迹，纷纷向他献上礼物，在他甲壳上挂满粗陋的护符。自然，作为一件欧姆尼塞亚的工具，他如今只能执行其被编程的勤勉规程，对这些……仪式漠然无感。这一点毋庸置疑。”
languages.original_text: "Subsequent to his servitorisation, he was assigned to the lower decks and resumed his service to the dynasty. In their ignorance, many of the laypeople see his return as a miracle of the God-Emperor, offering him gifts and draping primitive talismans over his carapace. Naturally, as an instrument of the Omnissiah, he is only capable of executing his programmed protocols of diligence, remaining oblivious to the occurrence of these... rituals. That is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: “被改造为机仆之后，他被分配到了下层甲板，重新开始为王朝服役。许多教外人士出于无知，竟将他的归来视作神皇降下的奇迹，纷纷向他献上礼物，在他甲壳上挂满粗陋的护符。自然，作为一件欧姆尼塞亚的工具，他如今只能执行其被编程的勤勉规程，对这些……仪式漠然无感。这一点毋庸置疑。”

languages.text: « Après sa servitorisation, il a été affecté aux ponts inférieurs où il continue de servir la dynastie. Dans leur ignorance, bon nombre de profanes interprètent son retour comme un miracle de l'Empereur-Dieu, ils lui offrent des cadeaux et drapent sa cuirasse de talismans primitifs. Naturellement, en tant qu'instrument de l'Omnimessie, il est uniquement capable d'exécuter les protocoles de diligence pour lesquels il a été programmé et n'a pas conscience de ces... rituels. Il s'agit là d'un fait indéniable. »
languages.original_text: "Subsequent to his servitorisation, he was assigned to the lower decks and resumed his service to the dynasty. In their ignorance, many of the laypeople see his return as a miracle of the God-Emperor, offering him gifts and draping primitive talismans over his carapace. Naturally, as an instrument of the Omnissiah, he is only capable of executing his programmed protocols of diligence, remaining oblivious to the occurrence of these... rituals. That is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: « Après sa servitorisation, il a été affecté aux ponts inférieurs où il continue de servir la dynastie. Dans leur ignorance, bon nombre de profanes interprètent son retour comme un miracle de l'Empereur-Dieu, ils lui offrent des cadeaux et drapent sa cuirasse de talismans primitifs. Naturellement, en tant qu'instrument de l'Omnimessie, il est uniquement capable d'exécuter les protocoles de diligence pour lesquels il a été programmé et n'a pas conscience de ces... rituels. Il s'agit là d'un fait indéniable. »

languages.text: «Tras su servidorización, se le asignó a las cubiertas inferiores para que continuara su servicio a la dinastía. Muchos de los laicos, ignorantes, ven su regreso como un milagro del Dios Emperador y le ofrecen regalos y cubren su caparazón de talismanes primitivos. Naturalmente, como instrumento del Omnissiah, solo puede ejecutar diligentemente sus protocolos programados, ignorando la celebración de estos... rituales. Es un hecho irrefutable».
languages.original_text: "Subsequent to his servitorisation, he was assigned to the lower decks and resumed his service to the dynasty. In their ignorance, many of the laypeople see his return as a miracle of the God-Emperor, offering him gifts and draping primitive talismans over his carapace. Naturally, as an instrument of the Omnissiah, he is only capable of executing his programmed protocols of diligence, remaining oblivious to the occurrence of these... rituals. That is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: «Tras su servidorización, se le asignó a las cubiertas inferiores para que continuara su servicio a la dinastía. Muchos de los laicos, ignorantes, ven su regreso como un milagro del Dios Emperador y le ofrecen regalos y cubren su caparazón de talismanes primitivos. Naturalmente, como instrumento del Omnissiah, solo puede ejecutar diligentemente sus protocolos programados, ignorando la celebración de estos... rituales. Es un hecho irrefutable».

languages.text: "Hizmetörleştirilmesinin ardından alt güvertelere atandı ve hanedana hizmetine yeniden başladı. Birçok sıradan insan; cehaletleri yüzünden onun dönüşünü Tanrı İmparator'un bir mucizesi olarak görüyor, ona hediyeler sunuyor ve kabuğunun üzerine ilkel nazarlıklar asıyor. Elbette Hermesih'in bir aracı olarak sadece programlanmış çaba protokollerini yerine getirebiliyor ve bu... Ayinlerin gerçekleştiğinden habersiz. Bu, inkâr edilemez bir gerçek."
languages.original_text: "Subsequent to his servitorisation, he was assigned to the lower decks and resumed his service to the dynasty. In their ignorance, many of the laypeople see his return as a miracle of the God-Emperor, offering him gifts and draping primitive talismans over his carapace. Naturally, as an instrument of the Omnissiah, he is only capable of executing his programmed protocols of diligence, remaining oblivious to the occurrence of these... rituals. That is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: "Hizmetörleştirilmesinin ardından alt güvertelere atandı ve hanedana hizmetine yeniden başladı. Birçok sıradan insan; cehaletleri yüzünden onun dönüşünü Tanrı İmparator'un bir mucizesi olarak görüyor, ona hediyeler sunuyor ve kabuğunun üzerine ilkel nazarlıklar asıyor. Elbette Hermesih'in bir aracı olarak sadece programlanmış çaba protokollerini yerine getirebiliyor ve bu... Ayinlerin gerçekleştiğinden habersiz. Bu, inkâr edilemez bir gerçek."

languages.text: "Nach seiner Servitorisierung wurde er den unteren Decks zugeteilt und hat seinen Dienst für die Dynastie wieder aufgenommen. In ihrer Ignoranz betrachten viele der Laien seine Rückkehr als Wunder des Gottimperators und bringen ihm Geschenke oder bedecken ihn mit primitiven Talismanen. Als Instrument des Omnissiah ist er natürlich nur in der Lage, seine programmierten Protokolle der Sorgfalt auszuführen und achtet nicht auf diese ... Rituale. Das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache."
languages.original_text: "Subsequent to his servitorisation, he was assigned to the lower decks and resumed his service to the dynasty. Naturally, as an instrument of the Omnissiah, he is only capable of executing his programmed protocols of diligence, remaining oblivious to the occurrence of these... rituals. That is an incontrovertible fact."
